name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Phoenix, AZ: TitleMax Title Loans at 7435 W Lower Buckeye Road offers emergency title loans with flexible Mon-Sat hours.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans is located at 7435 W Lower Buckeye Road, Suite 106 in west Phoenix, AZ. This standalone location serves the Phoenix area with convenient access from the Lower Buckeye corridor. Hours are Monday–Friday 9 AM–6 PM (with 7 PM closing on Monday and Friday), Saturday 10 AM–4 PM, and closed Sundays.

At this Phoenix location, TitleMax specializes in title loans—emergency cash secured by your vehicle's title. The team here can typically fund loans the same day you apply. To inquire about current rates, terms, or your loan eligibility, call (623) 478-0602 during business hours.

If you're a Phoenix resident facing an unexpected expense, this Lower Buckeye Road location is designed for fast access to emergency funding. Bring your vehicle title, proof of residency, and a valid ID when you visit. TitleMax focuses on accessible lending when you need it most.
address: 7435 W Lower Buckeye Rd suite 106, Phoenix, AZ 85043

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable — this is a lending product, not a subscription or service. No money-back guarantee exists.

pros: Loan approval in approximately 30 minutes — one of the fastest turnarounds in collateral-based lending
No credit score required — approval is based on vehicle value, not credit history
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
No bank account required in many of the 16 states where TitleMax operates
No prepayment penalty — early payoff is allowed at no additional cost
1,000+ store locations with mobile app and online portal for payment management
Serves both car and motorcycle owners, plus title pawns in Georgia locations
cons: APR typically 100%–300%+, making these among the most expensive consumer loans available
2023 CFPB enforcement action resulted in $10M civil penalty and $5M consumer relief for Military Lending Act violations and falsifying borrower records
Documented repeat CFPB offender — also under a 2016 enforcement order for lending and debt-collection abuses
Vehicle repossession risk if borrower defaults — the title is pledged as collateral
BBB ratings are inconsistent with no single national rating; quality and accreditation vary significantly by individual store location
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who own a paid-off car or motorcycle outright
Individuals needing same-day cash who have been declined by banks, credit unions, or online lenders
Borrowers in the 16 operating states who need $500–$5,000 quickly with no bank account
People who need to keep using their vehicle and cannot surrender it as with a traditional pawn
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for credit-thin consumers who own a paid-off vehicle, need fast cash, and have no viable lower-cost borrowing option available. The main caveat is severe: APRs routinely reach 100%–300%, and the company carries a significant enforcement history including a 2023 CFPB action for Military Lending Act violations. Any borrower who qualifies for a credit union PAL, a CDFI loan, or a mainstream personal loan should use those alternatives first.
services: Car title loans ($100–$10,000, varies by state)
Unsecured personal loans (up to ~$2,500 in select states)
In-store loan origination with 30-minute approval process
iOS and Android mobile app for account management
Debit and credit card payment processing
Store locator across 1,000+ locations in 16 states
meta_description: Phoenix, AZ: TitleMax Title Loans at Lower Buckeye Rd offers fast title loans with same-day funding available.
